problem.statement: Platform operations need one governed multi-item change request for variables and feature flags with explicit impact, validation snapshots, independent review, atomic apply, conflict prevention, rollback and redacted audit evidence.
problem.currentWorkaround: Individual platform mutations and partial workflow components exist, but the product contract, authoritative API, generated client, database protections and control-panel workflow were not governed by one schema-valid truth record.

actors.role: Authorized maker who creates validates and submits a governed platform change set
Independent checker who approves or rejects a submitted change set
Authorized operator applying an approved current change set
Authorized operator restoring a captured safe baseline
Authorized reader of immutable redacted platform change evidence
Sole owner of validation reservation workflow persistence atomic application rollback and audit

surfaces.exclusionReason: Customers consume resulting configuration but do not operate platform change sets.
Partners consume resulting configuration but do not operate platform change sets.
Captains consume resulting configuration but do not operate platform change sets.
Field operators consume resulting configuration but do not operate platform change sets.

outcome.statement: Platform changes move through one maker-checker lifecycle with live precondition snapshots, atomic apply, revision-safe rollback and immutable redacted audit evidence.
outcome.primaryMetric: governed platform change sets completed without conflict secret exposure or audit loss
outcome.baselineState: Change-set implementation exists but its product truth used a deprecated incompatible schema and lacked one permanent full-stack verification path.
outcome.targetState: The schema-valid product truth, authoritative OpenAPI, generated client, strict service boundary, PostgreSQL protections and control-panel workflow agree on one governed lifecycle.
outcome.observationWindow: targeted static database Go HTTP OpenAPI generated-client TypeScript control-panel security governance CI and independent review

criteria: The control panel lists change sets and exposes reason impact rollback plan actors timestamps and item-level before proposed and revision detail.
Validation captures current target state and revision and prevents another active request from reserving the same target.
Maker-checker separation is enforced for approval and rejection.
Apply and rollback use serializable transactions target locks optimistic revisions and immutable audit events.
Rollback reasons are required by the API contract service boundary and user interface.
Variable and feature-flag metadata survive an apply-and-rollback cycle.
Sensitive classifications existing sensitive targets and secret-shaped proposed JSON are rejected before persistence.
Authoritative OpenAPI generated client shared controller control-panel binding migrations and targeted tests pass on one immutable commit.
requiredChecks: independent product security QA release and production review

business: Platform Control exclusively owns change-set persistence and mutation.
Every item declares target identity owner scope value type classification expected revision and proposed JSON value.
Validation reserves targets and captures a current revision snapshot.
Apply is atomic across all items and advances each target revision exactly once.
Rollback restores value owner type classification status and feature targeting metadata.
Audit records transitions and target metadata without proposed or prior values.
negative: No direct platform mutation occurs outside Platform Control.
No proposer approves or rejects the same request.
No stale or conflicting request is applied.
No rollback occurs without an explicit reason.
No secret credential sensitive target or secret-shaped JSON enters a change set.
No change history is deleted or rewritten.
No implementation actor self-approves protected product release or production closure.

owners.uxJourneyOwner: Control Panel Platform Operations Experience Owner

execution.appetite: Close JRN-040 product contract code data API shared frontend and CI gaps without deploying production or self-approving protected evidence.
fixedConstraints: Repository mode is REMOTE_ONLY on sambassam.
Platform Control remains the sole owner of platform change mutations.
Maker-checker and sensitive-value boundaries remain fail-closed.
No PR merge force push release production deployment or SaaS activation is authorized.
Independent product security QA release and risk approvals cannot be self-issued by engineering.
unknowns: Independent security QA release and production outcomes
